subcodes.first_line: O ye two leaves who have drawn nigh unto the divine Threshold! Think not that your noble father or his kindred have been forgotten [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ورقه مقربه درگاه کبریا گمان منمااید که پدر بزرگوار یا متعلقین او فراموش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
